prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the Community Accommodation Service Tier 3 (CAS3) implemented by HM Prison and Probation Service (HMPPS), which operates in England and Wales. It does not apply to Scotland as it has a separate criminal justice system and different probation services.
